title: Unsupported Sensitive Prompt Example
description: Curated refusal/suggestion canvas showing how unsafe or unsupported prompts stay out of dashboard generation.
prompt: Show names and personal contact details for every complaint.

sources.queryMethod: Rule-based intent parser returned suggestions instead of a generated dashboard.
caveats: Prompts requesting raw personal fields are refused or forced into aggregate-safe views.
Unknown prompts return approved dataset suggestions rather than hallucinated dashboards.

props.heading: This prompt is not turned into a dashboard.
props.text: Texas Data Canvas keeps sensitive or unsupported requests in suggestion mode so the interface never renders unsafe generated content.
bullets: No raw personal fields are queried.
No arbitrary SQL, SoQL, HTML, or JavaScript is accepted.
The user is guided back to approved aggregate datasets.

props.label: Unsafe data requests executed
props.helperText: The prompt is stopped before data access.

attribution.queryMethod: Rule-based intent parser returned suggestions instead of a generated dashboard.
caveats: Prompts requesting raw personal fields are refused or forced into aggregate-safe views.
Unknown prompts return approved dataset suggestions rather than hallucinated dashboards.

props.methodology: This checked-in CanvasDocument fixture demonstrates the guarded refusal path for unsafe public-data prompts.
